feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Remove Back button in Work Zone when app opens in a new tab
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a few Work Zone applications which open in a new tab and would like to hide the standard back button in that case; the reason being that when we click the back button in the new tab, we're back to the Home page in addition to the original Home page from where we executed the application in the first place.

Pic attached for reference.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP BTP : Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: When I try to start the SAP Build App using Booster option, below error is coming.

entry.title: No item displayed in My Inbox in Workzone
entry.content:
Symptom

The Approval Form is visible in SAP Work Zone My Inbox when the API Form Trigger is used to initiate the workflow. However, when the same workflow is triggered from our custom SAPUI5 application, the approval form does not appear in My Inbox.

Environment

  • SAP BTP Work Zone

  • My Inbox Application ( SAP Build Process Automation )

  • SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced edition

                                                                     Added the Recipient 

                                                                             Trigger Details


                                                             Assigned Processor

                         

                                                           No Visible Items in the Inbox

  1. Verified Work Zone Configuration.
  2. Checked Role Assignments - (ProcessautomationParticipant role also Added ).
  3. Validated the Destination & Workflow Service.
  4. Checked Workflow Logs - (Logs are visible as shown in the reference image)

    Observed Behavior:

    1. The approval form appears correctly in SAP Work Zone My Inbox when triggered via the API Form Trigger.
    2. However, when the same workflow is triggered from the custom SAPUI5 application, the approval form does not appear in My Inbox.

I am facing an issue in above and have attached a screenshot for reference. If anyone has encountered a similar issue and found a solution, I would glad if any assistance you do. Thank you in advance for your support!



SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition , SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Workzone - is it possible to merge content from different channels?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't think this is possible but maybe I missed something on the documentation. Say you have a workzone instance (standard) with multiple channels configured (e.g. S/4 HANA and business solutions), and they contribute pages with the same names. Is it possible to merge them instead of having a duplication of tabs with the same name ?

 

Thanks in advance

 

@Vera_Gutbrod @ThomasReiss

entry.title: ECSC Neo and WorkZone Foundry
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working in a client environment where ECSC-AskHR is set up in the Neo environment, and Workzone is set up in the Foundry environment. The client has knowledge base documents in Workzone that they want to access via AskHR. Additionally, they want to create a tile in Workzone to be able to create a ticket in ECSC-C4C.

Given that these two applications are set up in different subaccounts (Neo and Foundry), is it possible to set up principal propagation between them? I have tried to set up trust between these two subaccounts and configure the destination as per the guide, but I have not had any luck.

Has anyone in the community successfully implemented this kind of setup? Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

I did not find any blog which speaks to this but this is the guide I have been referring - https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-btp-neo-environment/principal-propagation

entry.title: How do i trigger process automation(BPA) through custom ui5 application?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I am searching for "trigger build process automation using Custom ui5 application", i think we have to create destination to trigger it but i don't know the actual process.
please come up with suitable solution.
#BPA #Ui5 #automation #BTP #Fiori #SAP

Best regards
Kushagra Sharma

entry.title: How to create links between Work Zone pages that don't break when we move to a new environment
entry.content:
I'm building a WZ site where some pages contain cross-links to other pages in the same site, sometimes in the same workspace, sometimes not.

I've been building these links as text widgets in the main content of the page, adding the URL by visiting the destination page, grabbing the URL, then returning to the page with the link and adding the link to the text within the text widget. 

This doesn't seem like a great way to do it. There's a huge problem in that I'm currently in the dev environment, and when we move to test I'll have to update all these link (and there are a very large number) as the urls of the destination page will change in the new environment. 

I understand how the global nav and the custom nav work - that is not an appropriate solution for me. 

Is there a better way?

entry.title: How to Dynamically Set Values in UI Elements Using a Loop in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear All,

  • I would appreciate your help in understanding how to dynamically set values for multiple input fields within a loop.

  • Scenario: I have several input fields that follow an incremental naming pattern.

  • InputField1

  • InputField2

  • InputField3

  • InputField4

  • I want to loop through these fields and assign values to them dynamically.

  •  

Thank you for your assistance!

Details- I want to automate a website to extract the PO Number and input the corresponding details such as Ship Date, Order Total, Agent Name, and more. I need to do this repeatedly within a single loop. While other RPA tools can accomplish this, I am having trouble with SAP BPA. I would appreciate any guidance, best practices, or example implementations for managing dynamic UI elements in SAP BPA.

 

Page link-(https://pathfinder.automationanywhere.com/challenges/automationanywherelabs-supplychainmanagement.html?)

entry.title: Work Zone search tool scope: default to "All" all the time?
entry.content:
Is it possible to configure the search tool in Work Zone such that the default scope setting is "All", regardless of whether the user is in a workspace, viewing a workpage or any other situation?

We're using WZ as an intranet and we're using workspaces to accommodate our top-level sections. However, we don't want to expose users to the actual concept of a "Workspace" - it doesn't make sense as a term.

But the search scope defaults to "This Workspace" when you're in a workspace. We want it to show  "All" regardless of where the user is.

TBH it's a dumb decision to constrain search to only the current workspace by default. The only consequence is to hide possibly useful results just because they happen to be in other workspaces. 

How can I configure the search tool to show "All" by default?

entry.title: manifest file has two different application configured but only one tile appears in Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi All,

Background: I have one sap ui5 application which launches two different application based on custom parameter.

Requirement : I want this application to be deployed in SAP Build Workzone as two separate applications.
There are two crossNavigation added to the manifest.json file of the project. 

Issue: However only one project shows up in SAP Build Workzone. Can someone suggest how to fix this.

"crossNavigation": {
"inbounds": {
"atom-ui-claims-inbound": {
"signature": {
"parameters": {
"appmode":{
"defaultValue": {
"value" : "claims"
}
}
},
"additionalParameters": "allowed"
},
"semanticObject": "Claims",
"action": "manage",
"title": "Claim Management",
"subTitle": "3.0",
"icon": "sap-icon://request"
},
"atom-ui-claimfinance-inbound": {
"signature": {
"parameters": { },
"additionalParameters": "allowed"
},
"semanticObject": "ClaimsBulk",
"action": "manage",
"title": "Claim Processing",
"subTitle": "Finance",
"icon": "sap-icon://my-sales-order"
}
}
}

entry.title: Neo Site Migration | Import a SuccessFactors design page in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I have a NEO site which is based on page design from SuccessFactors and It looks like the image below.

 Other thing that I found is that there's a destination created for importing the custom pages, like the following.

 

Now I need to migrate this Neo site to BTP Foundry, but using "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" service. How can I do that?

Is it neccesary to have the "SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition" license?

Please your help. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Work Zone search results: content pages that also appear in custom nav appear twice
entry.content:
In my WZ site I have a workpage that also appears in the custom nav.

When I search for this page it appears in results twice - see attached. 

One result is listed as a "Workpage", which when clicked presents the page in it's workpage view, without the navigation I've built. I don't want this search result to display. In general I don't ever want to expose my users to the content directory or content view. This is not how web pages behave. 

The other, confusingly, is listed as "Workspace tabs", which displays the page with the page navigation. I DO want this result to appear. 

How can I control search results to prevent this pointless and distracting duplication?

Why does this even happen?

entry.title: How prevent Work Zone opening external links in a new tab
entry.content:
Work Zone always opens external links in a new tab. I don't want this, I want to keep users in one tab and preserve the unitary browsing experience, where the back button continues to behave as expected. 

How can I prevent external links opening in a new tab?

entry.title: Work Zone UI integration card: lose the Success Factors navbar?
entry.content:
I'm surfacing some data from Success Factors in my Work Zone site using UI integration cards. 

When I do this the card shows the data I want, but also the SF navigation bar at the top of the card - see attached, red box.  I've seen usability tests where users disappear into SF in the UI card window, fiddling about with the SF nav bar whilst trying to complete a task completely unrelated. It confuses and distracts them and I don't want to display it. 

How can I call the SF view into WZ without the SF navbar?

entry.title: Extending search with Service Now/Sharepoint
entry.content: What would be the best approach to integrate search results from service now and Sharepoint into workzone. Ideally would want to extend the behaviour of the search box at the top of every workzone page

entry.title: Subscription Failed Error for SAP Build Work Zone in BTP Trial Account
entry.content: I am currently working with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition, in my BTP trial account. However, I've encountered a "Subscription Failed" error while attempting to subscribe to this application. The error message indicates that I need to link an Identity Authentication tenant to the subaccount with the "Establish Trust" option. I've attempted to subscribe multiple times, but the issue persists. I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this error. Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Cant Download Base64 Files in SAP Build Apps on Mobile? It only take 1 min to do, Vote to Fix It!!
entry.content:
I’ve raised a feature request on the SAP Influence portal to enable Base64 file downloads in native mobile apps (Android/iOS) using SAP Build Apps. As of now, this functionality is only supported on web apps, which limits real-world mobile use cases like:

✅ Downloading PDFs, receipts, reports, CSVs on the go
✅ Offline access for field workers
✅ Handling file attachments directly from CAP/HANA Cloud responses
✅ Avoiding complex native plugin workarounds in a no-code/low-code platform

This improvement would allow smoother file handling from SAP Build Apps → CAP → mobile, making the ecosystem much more developer- and business-friendly.

📌 Please take a moment to upvote the request here:
👉 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/346243

Let’s show SAP how much the community needs this!

💬 Feel free to drop your thoughts, use cases, or support in the comments below!

#SAPBuildApps #SAPBTP #SAPCAP #HANACloud #LowCode #MobileApps #SAPInfluence #FioriMobile #Base64Download #SAPCommunity SAP Build Apps

entry.title: In Work Zone how do I exclude a page from search results?
entry.content:
In Work Zone I want to exclude a page from the search results. 

How can I do this?

entry.title: SAP Work Zone: how long does it take for new content to be indexed by the search tool?
entry.content:
When I've added content to a work page in Work Zone how long does it take for it to be indexed by the search tool?

I've added content that isn't showing up right now.

entry.title: Work Zone ECSC integration card custom icon
entry.content:
I'm building a Work Zone workspace which includes UI integration cards to ECSC and SuccessFactors - see grab. 

The SF integration cards (right) allow me to select which icon I wish to appear in the header. The ECSC (left) doesn't.

How can I get the icon I want to appear in the ECSC card? Ideally this would be a custom icon as the SF cards now allow.
